entry.title: New: RES26-104 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO RETAIN LEGAL SERVICES OF STARN O'TOOLE MARCUS & FISHER, A LAW CORPORATION, AS SPECIAL DEPUTY CORPORATION COUNSEL TO ADVISE AND REPRESENT THE CITY IN CLAIMS AND DISPUTES RELATING TO THE SKYLINE CORE SYSTEMS CONTRACT.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
